description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design, featuring a flat tabletop and four straight, slender legs. The wood grain is visible across the surface, giving it a natural and elegant appearance. The table has a dark brown finish, which adds a sense of warmth and sophistication. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its minimalist style. The construction appears sturdy, suitable for both functional and aesthetic purposes in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or communal spaces. Its proportions suggest it can comfortably accommodate several people for dining, working, or socializing.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden table with a dark brown finish and four straight legs, featuring a visible wood grain and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the tabletop and the depth of the table, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the full width and all four legs, with the wood grain pattern visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's depth and two legs from the other side.
